mapper.select:
select id, operator_name operatorName, module_name moduleName, operation_type operationType, operation_content operationContent, ip_address ipAddress, status, create_date createDate from t_operation_log
or operator_name like concat('%', #{operatorName}, '%')
or module_name like concat('%', #{moduleName}, '%')
or operation_type like concat('%', #{operationType}, '%')
order by create_date desc, id desc

select id, operator_name operatorName, module_name moduleName, operation_type operationType, operation_content operationContent, ip_address ipAddress, status, create_date createDate from t_operation_log where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_operation_log (operator_name, module_name, operation_type, operation_content, ip_address, status, create_date) values (#{operatorName}, #{moduleName}, #{operationType}, #{operationContent}, #{ipAddress}, #{status}, now())
mapper.update: update t_operation_log set operator_name = #{operatorName}, module_name = #{moduleName}, operation_type = #{operationType}, operation_content = #{operationContent}, ip_address = #{ipAddress}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
